title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Finolex Cables

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Finolex Cables
jsonLd.description:
We at Finolex Cables are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Finolex Cables:
Finolex Cables is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Cables!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
